provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Holidays Act .

provisions.title: Canada Day
provisions.content: 2 (1) July 1, not being a Sunday, is a legal holiday and shall be kept and observed as such throughout Canada under the name of " Canada Day ". (2) When July 1 is a Sunday, July 2 is a legal holiday and shall be kept and observed as such throughout Canada under the name of " Canada Day ".

provisions.title: Remembrance Day
provisions.content: 3 November 11, being the day in the year 1918 on which the Great War was triumphantly concluded by an armistice, is a legal holiday and shall be kept and observed as such throughout Canada under the name of “ Remembrance Day ”. Previous Version

provisions.title: Victoria Day
provisions.content: 4 The first Monday immediately preceding May 25 is a legal holiday and shall be kept and observed as such throughout Canada under the name of " Victoria Day ".
